segments.text: You were three and you drank your father's gin.
segments.speaker: S52

segments.text: You know what sucks worse than you?
segments.speaker: S52

segments.text: Alright, Mom, I get the point.
segments.speaker: S04

segments.text: Um, anyway, I've been John McGurk, the Soccer Comic.
segments.speaker: S04
